title: Rebuild of Evangelion 1 3 Adams and other Speculation
display_title: Rebuild of Evangelion 1 3 Adams and other Speculation
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild of Evangelion 1-3: Adams and other Speculation             Quote Post by marclee615 » Mon Aug 05, 2013 4:41 pm Hi Everybody, I have just finished watching the series again. And here are some of my observation: Adams: In 2.0, four adams are shown in memory in which the right most one has 3 eyes. My Prediction is that those adams are: 1. EVA-01 - it is "awaken" into pesudo-form in the end of 2.0 and possessed a third eye (like the one in memory 2. Mark.06 - it is the Adam (and its Spear), carried by the geyser to the Moon during 2i 3. EVA-13 - it is "awaken" at the end of 3.0, just like EVA-01 4. Mark.09 - it is called the "Adam's" vessel for quite a few times. I believe the core element has been removed in which the core element is the Nebuchadnezzar's Key. Ritsato's cat figures: In the tv series, she has one white and one black cat In the rebuild, two cats are black It may imply that in rebuild she has no affection over Gendo but of Misato(?)

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Tue Aug 06, 2013 4:37 am I don't know about Unit-01 being an Adam, considering that the bottom half of Lilith is still missing in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Aug 06, 2013 5:16 am Th3Marauder wrote: I don't know about Unit-01 being an Adam, considering that the bottom half of Lilith is still missing in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Aug 06, 2013 6:27 pm Now that Lilith is dead, I wouldn't be surprised to see Unit-01 reveal itself to be Lilith-reincarnate once again and then pull some world-restoring bullshit as the crux of Final Impact. I do like the idea that Mark 06 and 09, as well as maybe Unit-13, are the embodied Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Aug 06, 2013 7:08 pm Sachi wrote: Now that Lilith is dead, I wouldn't be surprised to see Unit-01 reveal itself to be Lilith-reincarnate once again and then pull some world-restoring bullshit as the crux of Final Impact. I do like the idea that Mark 06 and 09, as well as maybe Unit-13, are the embodied Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Aug 06, 2013 7:30 pm Azathoth wrote: Why Unit 13? Its resemblance to Unit 01, and gross birth, seem to imply that it's something made by Nerv from Lilith - but then again, the powers it demonstrates are so perplexing that I'm not sure what to make of its nature. (I still have no clue why Mari's AP rounds phase through it, for example.)

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Aug 06, 2013 7:42 pm Oh, right. Jesus, is there anything in this movie that Mari DOESN'T claim is some Adamic shit trying to fuck with her? Also, why would one of the Adams not have an AT field? And why is it being constructed (armored? processed? confined?) inside a gigantic artificial womb?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Aug 06, 2013 8:11 pm Well, apparently not having an AT Field = being of the ADAMs. And Mari seemed pretty sure of herself when she deduced that EVA-13 was one of the four. As for Mark.09, it too didn't showed any use of an AT Field and seems to compensate this lack by its insane resilience and regenerative capabilities, which seems to brand it as the "ADAM's Vessel", the logic is probably that the fact it can continue to function even beheqded could only mean that it's whole body is a core. So full-body core + lack of AT Field = ADAM's Vessel And lack of AT Field + used as a tool for an Impact = one of the four ADAMs On a side note, logically that would mean that Mark.06 didn't had an AT Field either, that could explain how the 12 Angel could possesses it, since in NGE an strong enough AT Field could stop Armisael. As for why EVA-13 was inside a pod, we don't know the specifics of the construction and outfitting of an Evangelion, maybe the body must be in a sterile environment for the armoring, and the pod provided such environment. As for Mark.06, the problem didn't arise since it was in the Noon, in the vacuum of space.

[]:             Quote Post by Ah Q » Tue Aug 06, 2013 8:15 pm Azathoth wrote: Oh, right. Jesus, is there anything in this movie that Mari DOESN'T claim is some Adamic shit trying to fuck with her? Also, why would one of the Adams not have an AT field? And why is it being constructed (armored? processed? confined?) inside a gigantic artificial womb?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Aug 06, 2013 8:25 pm Well, Gendo is seen at various points in Q with the armored case containing the Key, so unlike it can make grow as many Evangelion from that little thing that he wants, I don't think that EVA-13 was made from it. But it's possible that the Key is one of the four ADAMs reduced to a "skeletal" state, like ADAM in NGE was reduced to an embryo.(Kaji calls the Key "the Missing Number" in 2.0 after all), that would mean that so far the four ADAMS would be : - Mark.06 : was buried in the Moon alongside a Spear, and Kaworu's coffins were just beside it, and he is the First Angel. - EVA-13 : designed as such by Mari - The Key of N : reduced to an easily transportable size ias a contingency plan if something happen with the other? - ??? : EVA-01? Mark.09? Was destroyed during 2I? Maybe it was transformed into an Evangelion and destroyed by WILLE during the time skip?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Wed Aug 07, 2013 3:45 am Again, I don't agree with Eva 01 potentially being an Adam. It has an AT-field, and Lilith is missing its legs. There's no conspiracy here, 99% chances it's similar to the old series.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Aug 07, 2013 3:49 am Jinroh wrote: Again, I don't agree with Eva 01 potentially being an Adam. It has an AT-field, and Lilith is missing its legs. There's no conspiracy here, 99% chances it's similar to the old series.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Wed Aug 07, 2013 4:20 am As for why Eva 13 (have we decided yet if it's just Evangelion 13 or Unit-13) not having an AT Field, I thought it was made pretty clear by Asuka in EoE that an AT Field is the result of a resident soul in the Eva, as in Yui or Asuka's mum or Rei I. The reason the Adams have no AT Fields is because they have no resident souls.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Aug 07, 2013 5:37 am We don't know if the rule of a resident soul which must in an Eva to be piloted is still true in NTE, after all we saw Asuka getting ready to pilot EVA-03 and Mari happily going from one Eva to another, so it's possible that the ADAMs simply can't generate an AT Field for whatever reason, even thought their offspring the Angels can do it.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Aug 07, 2013 8:28 am ElMariachi wrote: We don't know if the rule of a resident soul which must in an Eva to be piloted is still true in NTE, after all we saw Asuka getting ready to pilot EVA-03 and Mari happily going from one Eva to another, so it's possible that the ADAMs simply can't generate an AT Field for whatever reason, even thought their offspring the Angels can do it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ah Q » Wed Aug 07, 2013 1:10 pm ElMariachi wrote: Well, Gendo is seen at various points in Q with the armored case containing the Key, so unlike it can make grow as many Evangelion from that little thing that he wants, I don't think that EVA-13 was made from it.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed Aug 07, 2013 1:28 pm Ah Q wrote: Granted, there may be multiple ways to turn Adams into Evas. But I can't help but think Mari's line about Eva-13 being an "Adams' survivor" is rather cryptic. I am still not convinced it means that Eva-13 is one of the original Adams.

[]:             Quote Post by StormSky92 » Wed Aug 07, 2013 10:02 pm Giji Shinka wrote: A clone of Adam? But then we have a problem regarding other, "normal" Eva units. Whose clones they are? Lilith's? Can they do something and be called as Adam afterwards? Khhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh.......We need more info about Eva's in 4.0......

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu Aug 08, 2013 1:02 am It's possible, but i hope we answers about Adams cause they are related to impacts, and impacts are pretty important plot point.

[]:             Quote Post by Mbryo » Sun Aug 11, 2013 10:58 am What's with this notion that Adams lack AT Fields? I know it does not appply to NME, but in NGE Adam had an insanely powerful AT Field (Kaworu's AT Field which shuts off everything and creates an impassable barrier when manifested) So why would they lack one in NME? Mark.09 and 13th clearly appears to lack AT Fields (come to think of it, not so sure about Eva-13's case, it does look like it is manifesting an AT Field when Kaworu says something about matching tempos and the Eva breaks through Lilith's barrier). And as to Mari's comments, Mari only identifies Eva 13th as being an Adam's survivor after she sees the Eva fully awaken. And mentioning it, Mark.09 seems to be a rather special case; It is clearly not one of the Adams, for one thing it a full-body core being, something the Adams clearly are not. It seems be affiliated with the Wunder, based on the fact that it is referred to as its 'original master' and the fact that they share a similar face. And I also disagree with the misconception Eva 01 is the Adam with the Third Eye, because during Near Third Impact Eva 01 is clearly shown to possess a core (exposed when the restraints blow off) and the Third-eyed Giant during Second Impact does not have a core. But I also think that the thing on 01's forehead IS indeed a Third Eye. In the very last shot the thing on the forehead is shown to be colored the same red color as 01's eyes. About Eva 13, I actually believe that it was Two Adams fused into one body. In the shots when Eva 02, 08 or 09 appears in the same shot as 13th, if you look closely you can see that 13th is actually twice as big as the other Evas; its body is a lot bulkier, and it is taller. And the fact that it has two pairs of eyes and arms, and the fact that it has two halos , AND the fact it requires a double entry system (the presence of two souls needed to fully activate the Eva; when Kaworu dies, one pair of eyes close and while the Eva remains awakened, it loses its Godhood), traits that none of the Adams or Evas Impact possessed, also implies that it is two beings rather than one. The fact that it does not exhibit an AT Field is also probably because of this as well. In NGE and NME the presence of two equal AT Fields neutralizes both; that is why when Shinji shuts off Kaworu, the Eva is no longer able to manifest an AT Field. But when Shinji and Kaworu 'match tempos', when the souls of the two pilots synchronize, the Eva becomes a one full entity and is able to manifest an AT Field, an AT Field much powerful than that of regular Evas. The RS Hoppers were added in for defense because Gendo probably guessed Kaworu was eventually going to realize whatever trick he had up his sleeves and stop cooperating. So to sum it up my speculation is that: Eva 01 : Not one of the Adams, but probably something equal or similar; maybe Lilith's bunshin like she used to be in the series. Mark 06 : One of the Adams, got blasted up to the moon during Second Impact by a spurt of blood/red seawater. Buried until Seele dug him up and made him into an Evangelion. (to add in, I think Fuyutski's line in 2.0, about 06's construction process being weird, I think he was probably referring to the fact that while normal Evas are grown with their armors/restraints, Mark.06's 'construction' was just putting the armor on an already complete body.) Mark.09 : Not one of the Adams, but an Adam's vessel, has something to do with the Wunder. Maybe it is the core taken from Wunder and converted into an Evangelion. Eva 13th : Two of the Adams fused into one. It was put in the womb-like thingy in order to fuse the two seperate Adams into one. Key of Nebuchadnezzar : One of the Adams, or its remains.
